---
description: Build guidance for the Temporal Nexus + Aspire .NET 10 demo.
applyTo: "**/*.{cs,csproj,sln,props,targets,json}"
---

# .NET + Temporal Nexus guidance

- Target modern .NET 10 SDK/LTS conventions.
- Prefer Aspire-first patterns for local orchestration and observability.
- Model features around a focused e-commerce flow that highlights Temporal Nexus bridging.
- Keep implementations readable and well-structured for blog-post walkthroughs.
